---
title: "Research"
---

## Publications

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Farmers, experts and students' subjective probability distributions on methane emission reductions in livestock farming: An experimental comparison across elicitation methods</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Magnapera, C., Kažemekaitytė, A., Raffaelli, R., & Cerroni, S. (2025)</div>
<div class="pub-journal">Bio-based and Applied Economics · <a href="https://doi.org/10.36253/bae-17310">doi:10.36253/bae-17310</a></div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Mechanisms behind covid-19 scepticism among socially marginalised individuals in Europe</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Nero, K., Orrù, K., Nævestad, T.-O., Savadori, L., Kažemekaitytė, A., et al. (2023)</div>
<div class="pub-journal">Journal of Risk Research, 26(6), 675–696 · <a href="https://doi.org/10.1080/13669877.2023.2208119">doi:10.1080/13669877.2023.2208119</a></div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Blinded by worries: sin taxes and demand for temptation under financial worries</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Burlacu, S., Kažemekaitytė, A., Ronzani, P., & Savadori, L. (2022)</div>
<div class="pub-journal">Theory and Decision, 92(1), 141–187 · <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11238-021-09820-5">doi:10.1007/s11238-021-09820-5</a></div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Resilience in care organisations: challenges in maintaining support for vulnerable people in Europe during the covid-19 pandemic</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Orrù, K., Nero, K., Nævestad, T.-O., et al. (2021)</div>
<div class="pub-journal">Disasters, 45, S48–S75 · <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/disa.12526">doi:10.1111/disa.12526</a></div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Socioeconomic status and consumer happiness</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Savadori, L., & Kažemekaitytė, A. (2021)</div>
<div class="pub-journal">In Dutta & Mandal (Eds.), Consumer Happiness: Multiple Perspectives (ch. 4, pp. 49–66). Springer Singapore · <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/978-981-33-6374-8_3">doi:10.1007/978-981-33-6374-8_3</a></div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Covid-19 information disorder: six types of harmful information during the pandemic in Europe</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Hansson, S., Orrù, K., Torpan, S., Kažemekaitytė, A., et al. (2021)</div>
<div class="pub-journal">Journal of Risk Research · <a href="https://doi.org/10.1080/13669877.2020.1871058">doi:10.1080/13669877.2020.1871058</a></div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Handling false information in emergency management: a cross-national comparative study of European practices</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Torpan, S., Hansson, S., Rhinard, M., Kažemekaitytė, A., et al. (2021)</div>
<div class="pub-journal">International Journal of Disaster Risk Reduction · <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijdrr.2021.102151">doi:10.1016/j.ijdrr.2021.102151</a></div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Tax behaviour: assessment of tax compliance in European Union countries</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Pukeliene, V., & Kažemekaitytė, A. (2016)</div>
<div class="pub-journal">Ekonomika, 95(2), 30–56 · <a href="https://doi.org/10.15388/Ekon.2016.2.10123">doi:10.15388/Ekon.2016.2.10123</a></div>
</div>

---

## Under Review & Working Papers

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Bets and bites: Higher order risk preferences for money and food <span class="badge badge-rr">R&R</span></div>
<div class="pub-authors">Kažemekaitytė, A., Cerroni, S., Drichoutis, A. C., Raffaelli, R., & Vassilopoulos, A. (2026)</div>
<div class="pub-journal">Journal of Behavioural and Experimental Economics</div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Healthy food choices under pressure: the role of episodic future thinking <span class="badge badge-review">Under Review</span></div>
<div class="pub-authors">Kažemekaitytė, A., Qian, Y., Nayga Jr., R. M., Cerroni, S., & Raffaelli, R. (2026)</div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Farmers' preferences for action-based, result-based and hybrid payment schemes to incentivize carbon farming practices: A lab-in-the-field experiment <span class="badge badge-wip">Working Paper</span></div>
<div class="pub-authors">Magnapera, C., Kažemekaitytė, A., Raffaelli, R., Nayga Jr., R. M., & Cerroni, S. (2025)</div>
</div>

---

## Crowd Science

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">The robustness of mental accounting: a global perspective <span class="badge badge-forthcoming">Forthcoming</span></div>
<div class="pub-authors">Priolo, G., Stablum, F., Vacondio, M., et al. (2026)</div>
<div class="pub-journal">Journal of Consumer Research (conditionally accepted)</div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Investigating the analytical robustness of the social and behavioural sciences <span class="badge badge-forthcoming">Forthcoming</span></div>
<div class="pub-authors">Aczel, B., Szaszi, B., Clelland, H. T., et al. (2026)</div>
<div class="pub-journal">Nature</div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Collective Evidence on Behavioral Interventions Targeting Carbon Pricing Support: A Many-Designs Approach with 55 Studies <span class="badge badge-review">Working Paper</span></div>
<div class="pub-authors">Huber, J., Holzknecht, A., Schwaiger, R., et al. (2026)</div>
</div>

---

## Work in Progress

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">The perceived residual value of electronic waste: a discrete choice experiment on mobile phone disposal</div>
<div class="pub-authors">with Compagnoni, M., Guida, V., Klaser, K., & Santini, E.</div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Supermarket interventions to promote food consumption with lower climate impacts</div>
<div class="pub-authors">with Faccioli, M., Czajkowski, M., Zawadzki, W., & Janssen, M.</div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Food knowledge and food choice relationship in sustainability and health domains</div>
<div class="pub-authors">with Quell, D., Faccioli, M., & Raffaelli, R.</div>
</div>


<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Choice matching in discrete choice experiments</div>
<div class="pub-authors">with Cerroni, S., & Nayga Jr., R. M.</div>
</div>

<div class="pub">
<div class="pub-title">Identifiable victim effect</div>
<div class="pub-authors">with Savadori, L., & Ritov, I.</div>
</div>
